ab: cuqi cu musa pinqwasan biru saniq coni.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: mnwah cu pinqwasan ga, mingi cu maray kabang bbiru.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: ana nanu qnqaya ini cu aray.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: t’arang mqwas ga, kingan ki glux mu ga squn cami mktayax biru.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: pcpngan pinqwasan ga, k’syuxun cu nya ppbiru ro ccom qa glux mu.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: kyalun cu nya sesiy maha, “m_yubuq hayi mtuliq saniq babaw nya, ta mcuqi la!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
